The Proto into europeans were the group of which modern day indo Europeans  descend from

[[Manu]], one of the [[three ancestors]] was a priest-king of the proto indo europeans.

[[Category:Proto Indo Europeans]][[Category:Old pages]][[Category:Old pages]][[Category:Old pages]][[Category:Old pages]][[Category:Old pages]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
